title: 'Unexpected and unnatural' light linked to Chinese rocket, not a UFO
description: The light shot across the Otago sky on Friday night, shortly after a rocket launch in China, an astronomer says.

title: 'Unexpected and unatural' light linked to Chinese rocket, not a UFO
description: The light shot across the Otago sky on Friday night, shortly after a rocket launch in China, an astronomer says.

title: 'Please Don't Be Stupid': UFO Researcher's Chilling Last Words Before His Death at 53 Revealed — Fueling Questions Over Missing or Deceased Scientists
description: There was little ambiguity surrounding David Wilcock’s death, as the 53-year-old fatally shot himself in front of responding officers on April 20.

title: ‘Who killed...?’: Probe deepens into deaths & disappearances of 12 US scientists with nuke, UFO info
description: A growing mystery surrounds 12 U.S. scientists linked to nuclear, space, and classified programs who have died or gone missing since 2022. Lawmakers demand answers as FBI and Congress probe possible links, while David Wilcock’s death adds new urgency to the case. Amid rising national security concerns, a separate Pentagon leak scandal involving Andrew Hugg further intensifies scrutiny.

title: Tragic 911 details from the final minutes of UFO expert David Wilcock’s life after cops respond to his call for help
description: TRAGIC details from the last moments of a tormented UFO expert's life have been revealed after cops released a partial transcript of his 911 call. David Wilcock, 53, called 911 on Monday morning and spoke of issues with his health and finances just minutes before he died by suicide. Wilcock died from a gunshot wound...
